name: A-1 Caribou Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onions in 2 tablespoons of butter until golden brown.
2. Pound the steak to an even thickness for tenderizing.
3. Sear the steak over high heat in the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter, about 2 minutes on each side.
4. Add sherry, A-1 Steak Sauce, Worcestershire Sauce, chives, parsley, salt, and pepper to the steak.
5. Reduce heat to medium and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes per side.
6. Add brandy, taste, then serve immediately at the table.
